debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace X
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : LocallyCompactSpace X
inst✝ : T2Space X
μ : ComplexMeasure X
h : ∀ (f : ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap X ℂ), μ.integral ⇑f = 0
⊢ μ = 0

failed_attempts:
ext s hs
  have h_totalVar : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
    sorry
  simp only [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.zero_apply]
  exact MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.apply_eq_zero_of_totalVariation_eq_zero h_totalVar s

ext s hs
  have h1 : μ.re = 0 ∧ μ.im = 0 := by
    constructor <;> {
      ext t ht
      sorry
    }
  simp [ComplexMeasure.apply_eq_re_add_im_smul μ s, h1.1, h1.2]

ext s hs
  have hre : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), (μ.re).integral f.re = 0 := fun f => by
    have := h f
    simp only [ComplexMeasure.integral, Complex.add_re, Complex.mul_re, Complex.I_re, 
      Complex.I_im] at this
    linarith [congrArg Complex.re this]
  have him : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), (μ.im).integral f.re = 0 := fun f => by
    have := h f
    simp only [ComplexMeasure.integral, Complex.add_im, Complex.mul_im, Complex.I_re, 
      Complex.I_im] at this
    linarith [congrArg Complex.im this]
  simp only [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.coe_zero, Pi.zero_apply]
  rw [show μ s = μ.re s + Complex.I * μ.im s from rfl]
  sorry

ext s _
  have htot : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
    rw [← MeasureTheory.Measure.measure_univ_eq_zero]
    by_contra hne
    push_neg at hne
    -- Use density of C₀ in L¹ and polar decomposition
    sorry
  simp only [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.coe_zero, Pi.zero_apply]
  exact MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.eq_zero_of_totalVariation_eq_zero htot s
